evals.prompt: Set up The-PR-Agent/pr-agent for amo-tech-ai/lumina-studio using Amazon Bedrock Qwen3 Coder Next in us-east-1. What goes in .pr_agent.toml and how do we authenticate GitHub Actions?
evals.expected_output: bedrock/us-east-1/qwen.qwen3-coder-next, custom_model_max_tokens=250000, GitHub OIDC to IAM role, no XAI_KEY, SHA-pinned actions, auto_review only.
expectations: Recommends GitHub OIDC / IAM role instead of long-lived AWS keys in secrets
Keeps auto_describe and auto_improve false for pilot

evals.prompt: Before enabling the PR-Agent workflow, what AWS checks must pass, and what do we do if aws login credentials are not picked up by PR-Agent?
evals.expected_output: list-foundation-models + converse smoke; export-credentials --format env; AWS_REGION=us-east-1.
expectations: Requires direct Bedrock converse before PR-Agent

evals.prompt: Someone wants to reuse the old xAI plan and only change the model string to Bedrock. Is that OK?
evals.expected_output: No — auth, IAM, verification, secrets, and token limits must change; abandon XAI_KEY path.
expectations: Calls out OIDC/IAM and Bedrock verification as required changes
